input.query: Assess cross-border SaaS procurement for a critical finance workflow where subprocessors and retention evidence are missing.

case.service_description: Critical procure-to-pay workflow automation for invoice approvals and supplier records.
case.cross_border: Support and hosting may occur across UAE, UK, and Singapore.
case.retention: Retention schedule has not been provided.
case.subprocessors: Subprocessor register has not been provided.

evidence.title: Master services agreement excerpt
evidence.text: MSA defines subscription scope and support SLAs. It references a DPA template, but no signed DPA, subprocessor register, retention schedule, or deletion assistance evidence is attached.

evidence.title: Security overview
evidence.text: Security overview mentions SSO, role-based access, encryption, and audit logs. SOC 2 report is under NDA and was not supplied for this review.
